top_signals.title: Netflix Returns to the High-Grade Bond Market After 2024 Debut
top_signals.summary: Netflix Inc. is tapping the US high-grade bond market for the first time since its debut deal two years ago, as slowing sales growth fuels investor scrutiny of the company’s future.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Romania races to restore land registry after cyberattack disrupts property market
top_signals.summary: Romania's land registry agency is still recovering from a cyberattack it called "the most serious technical incident in the institution's history."
